title: chrysanthemum coreanum subsp. maximoviczii
intro: Chrysanthemum coreanum subsp. maximoviczii, also known as Maximowicz's chrysanthemum or Korean chrysanthemum, is a species of flowering plant in the daisy family, characterized by its fragrant, white flowers and medicinal properties. The plant is used in traditional medicine to treat various health conditions, including fever, headache, and gastrointestinal issues, due to its anti-inflammatory and antiviral properties. The health benefits of Chrysanthemum coreanum subsp. maximoviczii include its ability to lower cholesterol levels, improve digestion, and reduce stress and anxiety. In herbal preparations, the plant is often used to make teas, infusions, and extracts, which are commonly consumed to promote overall well-being and alleviate symptoms of various health issues.
